name: The Aperol Affair
description: A glowing sunset-hued blend that brings the warmth of an Italian summer evening to life in each sip.  This refreshing cocktail is made with Aperol, sparkling wine (prosecco), and soda water, garnished with an orange slice; it offers a bittersweet orange profile with a gentle effervescence (around 11–12% ABV).

name: White Sangria Special
description: Imagine a sunlit orchard captured in a glass, with peach and apple notes dancing amidst citrus blossoms.  This white sangria uses a crisp white wine base (often sauvignon blanc), muddled peaches, apples, and a splash of soda; it’s lightly sweet and aromatic (about 8–10% ABV).

name: Patron Ala Mojito
description: A daring fusion of Caribbean tropics and Mexican agave, where cool mint and lime mingle with tequila in a minty whirlwind.  Made with Patron silver tequila, fresh mint leaves, lime juice, sugar, and soda water, this mojito-inspired cocktail is minty-fresh yet agave-forward (around 7–10% ABV).

name: Patron De Strawberry
description: A romantic strawberry serenade, blending the ripe sweetness of berries with smoky agave warmth, like a sunset in a glass.  This cocktail mixes Patron tequila (silver or reposado) with strawberry liqueur or puree and lime, delivering a sweet-tart berry flavor (roughly 25–30% ABV).

name: Patron De Chocolate
description: A velvety nocturne where rich dark chocolate curls swirl with warm tequila undertones, as decadent as a midnight dessert.  Combining Patron XO Café (or chocolate liqueur) with Patron tequila, this indulgent cocktail offers creamy cocoa notes and a gentle tequila backbone (around 20–25% ABV).

name: Xclv Martini
description: A sleek, sophisticated martini that glints with twilight colors and hints of mystery.  This martini-style drink is made with premium gin (or vodka) and a whisper of dry vermouth, stirred until icy cold and served with an olive or lemon twist; it’s crisp, aromatic, and elegantly smooth.

name: Queens Breath
description: Queens Breath is a cocktails crafted to delight. Queens Breath delivers a signature drink experience inspired by classic flavors. Typical cocktail characteristics: 8-15% ABV (approx).

name: Chivalry
description: A noble blend of classic flavors, combining timeless elegance with a daring edge in every glass.  This chivalrous cocktail might include whiskey, aromatic bitters, and citrus peel, creating a smooth amber drink with warm spice and oak notes.

name: Juliet Butterfly
description: Delicate and whimsical, a romantic pink flutter that captures the essence of a midsummer night’s dream.  Often made with vodka (or rum) and a splash of lychee or berry liqueur, this cocktail is sweet, floral, and light (about 10–15% ABV).

name: White Russian
description: A silky velvety concoction reminiscent of a cozy Russian evening, delivering creamy coffee kick and gentle sweetness.  Made with vodka, coffee liqueur (like Kahlúa), and heavy cream, it’s shaken or stirred to a smooth froth, yielding a rich cream-colored drink (~20–25% ABV).

name: Amaretto Sour
description: A bittersweet serenade that plays almond notes with lively citrus, as harmonious as a string quartet.  It mixes almond-flavored amaretto liqueur with fresh lemon juice and a dash of simple syrup, shaken to a frothy foam; the result is sweet yet tangy (around 15–20% ABV).

name: Negroni
description: Bold and sophisticated, this ruby-red classic blends a bitter thrill with botanical grace.  Made with equal parts gin, Campari, and sweet vermouth, served over ice with an orange peel; it has a strong bitter-citrus taste (about 24–30% ABV) and a robust, aromatic finish.

name: Tequila Sunrise
description: A dawn-colored delight, painting the glass with vibrant orange and crimson hues just like a desert sunrise.  Consisting of tequila and orange juice, with grenadine slowly poured to sink through the drink, this cocktail is fruity and layered (roughly 10–12% ABV).

name: Classic Margarita
description: A zesty timeless icon, a fiesta of bright lime and sun-kissed agave perched on a salt-rimmed glass.  Made with tequila, triple sec (orange liqueur), and fresh lime juice (often on the rocks or blended); it’s tangy and refreshing (around 20–25% ABV).

name: Frozen Margarita
description: A frosty swirl of tropical bliss, capturing summer vibes in a chilly sip.  Blended with ice, tequila, triple sec, and lime juice, this slushy version is ice-cold and tangy, ideal for hot afternoons (~15–20% ABV).

name: Watermelon Mojito
description: Juicy watermelon meets Caribbean charm, a vibrant cascade of mint and melon on the palate.  This twist on a mojito uses white rum muddled with fresh watermelon, mint, lime, and soda; it’s sweet, refreshing, and lightly effervescent (~10% ABV).

name: Cosmopolitan
description: Sleek and city-chic, a pink-hued cocktail that blends tart cranberry with crisp citrus, like a skyline reflected in twilight.  Vodka, cranberry juice, Cointreau (or triple sec), and lime juice are shaken and strained; the result is a tart, smooth drink (~15% ABV).

name: Mango Daiquiri
description: Tropical sunshine captured in a glass, where sweet mango purée dances with island rum.  Light rum blended with fresh mango and lime juice (and ice) produces a smooth, slushy cocktail bursting with fruity sweetness (~10% ABV).

name: Piña Colada
description: A luscious island dream, as if sipping a creamy tropical sunset on a sandy beach.  White rum, pineapple juice, and coconut cream are blended with ice into a smooth, sweet escape (~10–13% ABV).

name: Gin Tonic
description: Gin Tonic is a cocktails crafted to delight. Gin Tonic delivers a signature drink experience inspired by classic flavors. Typical cocktail characteristics: 8-15% ABV (approx).

name: Red Sangria
description: A lively Spanish fiesta in a glass, pouring red hues and garlands of fruit into each sip.  Red wine (often with brandy or orange liqueur), plus fresh oranges, apples, and other fruits, chilled in a pitcher; it’s fruity, slightly sweet, and light (around 8–10% ABV).

name: Bacardi Coke Float
description: A playful Cuban riff, combining foamy cola cream and a whisper of rum warmth.  Bacardi rum is floated gently atop cola in a tall glass; as the cola froths, it creates a creamy foam. The drink is sipped by mixing through the foam (~5–8% ABV, since it’s mostly cola).

name: Strawberry Haze
description: A sweet pink haze enveloping the glass, like the blush of dawn mixed with ripe strawberry fields.  Typically made with vodka (or gin) and fresh strawberry puree, perhaps with a splash of citrus; the result is a bright, berry-forward cocktail (~10–15% ABV).

name: Dulce De Dewar's
description: Dulce de Dewar's is a cocktails crafted to delight. Dulce de Dewar's delivers a signature drink experience inspired by classic flavors. Typical cocktail characteristics: 8-15% ABV (approx).

name: Peach High Ball
description: Bubbly peaches rising in a tall glass, as effervescent as an orchard breeze at dusk.  Typically whiskey or vodka mixed with iced tea or soda and peach syrup; it’s fizzy, sweet-peach flavored, and low-alcohol (~5–8% ABV).

name: Purple Hands
description: A mysterious violet bloom in your glass, bursting with lush berry aromas and intrigue.  Possibly a blend of tequila or gin with berry liqueurs (like blueberry or blackcurrant); it’s fruity, sweet, and moderately strong (~15% ABV).

name: Lady Potion
description: A delicate elixir, feminized by velvety fruit flavors and a subtle enchanting glow.  Often a mix of vodka and mixed berry liqueurs (or rose wine), with a bit of citrus, making a smooth, sweet cocktail (around 10–15% ABV).

name: Blowjob
description: An audacious and cheeky shot that starts off creamy and ends with a playful kick.  A layered shooter of coffee liqueur (such as Kahlúa) and Irish cream (Baileys), topped with whipped cream; meant to be consumed in one go (~20–25% ABV).

name: 2 Face
description: A mischievous two-faced shot with contrasting layers, where each side reveals its own character.  Often made with half crème de menthe or coffee liqueur and half bailey’s or crème, creating distinct flavors; sweet and potent (around 20–30% ABV).

name: Green Melon Shot
description: A bright emerald drop of sweet melon lusciousness, refreshing as a summer orchard breeze.  Made with melon liqueur (like Midori) and vodka (sometimes with a splash of citrus); fruity and syrupy, about 20% ABV.

name: Jagerbomb
description: Jagerbomb is a shooters crafted to delight. Jagerbomb delivers a signature drink experience inspired by classic flavors. Typical shot characteristics: 15-40% ABV (approx).

name: Night Bomb
description: A midnight thrill-packed bomb, bursting with bold liquor intensity under the cover of darkness.  Typically a combination of vodka and dark liqueur (or sometimes a cognac) dropped into an energy drink; strong (30–40% ABV in the mix) with a caffeinated kick.

name: Dewar's 12 Y/o (whiskey)
description: Dewar's 12 y/o (Whiskey) is a single shot crafted to delight. Dewar's 12 y/o (Whiskey) delivers a signature drink experience inspired by classic flavors. Typical spirit characteristics: 40% ABV (approx).

name: Singleton (whiskey)
description: A single malt whiskey known for its mellow sweetness and gentle oak character.  Distilled in Dufftown, 12 years old, 40% ABV; it’s light-bodied with caramel, apple, and malted barley notes.

name: Jack Daniel (whiskey)
description: Jack Daniel (Whiskey) is a single shot crafted to delight. Jack Daniel (Whiskey) delivers a signature drink experience inspired by classic flavors. Typical spirit characteristics: 40% ABV (approx).

name: Black Label (whiskey)
description: A rich and smoky blended Scotch, each sip unveiling layers of peat, spice, and dried fruit.  Johnnie Walker Black Label, ~12-year blend, 40% ABV; balanced, well-rounded with a smoky finish.

name: Jim Beam (whiskey)
description: A classic Kentucky bourbon, warm and hearty with sweet vanilla and charred oak notes.  Kentucky straight bourbon, 40% ABV; corn and rye sweetness with a hint of caramel and spice.

name: Bacardi Black (rum)
description: A sultry black rum with deep caramel hues, evoking warm smoke and roasted nuts.  Dark rum, 40% ABV; aged longer for a richer flavor of molasses, vanilla, and smoky char.

name: Cazadores Reposado (tequila)
description: An amber tequila imbued with a gentle whisper of oak, as though sunshine distilled into spirit.  Reposado (aged 2–11 months) tequila, 40% ABV; smooth with hints of vanilla, cooked agave, and light oak.

name: Virgin Piña Colada
description: A creamy tropical escape in a glass, blending coconut and pineapple to evoke beachside relaxation.  Coconut cream, pineapple juice, and ice are blended into a smooth, non-alcoholic delight; rich, sweet, and creamy (0% ABV).
allergens: Allergens: May contain traces of alcohol of alcohol (cross-contamination possible)

name: Elegant Purple
description: A regal blend of bright purple hues, exuding exotic fruit aromas and royal refreshment.  Likely a mix of grape, blueberry, or blackcurrant juices with lemonade or soda; sweet, fruity, and completely alcohol-free.

name: Apple Soda
description: A crisp bubbly serenade of orchard-fresh apple in a sparkling embrace.  Carbonated apple-flavored soda; sweet and fizzy, often caffeine-free and full of apple aroma (0% ABV).

name: Heineken Original
description: A frosty bucket brimming with golden Heineken bottles, summoning convivial cheers.  Typically 5 bottles of Heineken Original on ice; each 330ml bottle is 5% ABV with a crisp, clean lager taste.

name: Heineken Silver
description: An icy bucket of Heineken Silver cans, offering ultra-smooth refreshment for the crowd.  Usually 5 cans of Heineken Silver (4% ABV) on ice; light-bodied lager, very mild flavor.

name: Heineken Draft Beer
description: Crafted to taste like a freshly poured draft, delivering vibrant bubbles in every can.  Heineken Draught-style in can, 5% ABV; crisp, effervescent lager flavor.

name: San Mig Hard Seltzer Citrus Mix
description: A frosty bucket filled with sparkling citrus cocktails, each can a zesty escape.  Bucket of 5 San Mig Hard Seltzer Citrus Mix cans; each 330ml is 5% ABV, gluten-free and flavored with lemon/citrus.

name: San Mig Chocolate Lager
description: A chilled bucket of rich chocolate-lager bottles, promising sweet indulgence among friends.  Contains 5 bottles of San Mig Chocolate Lager (5% ABV) on ice; dark lager infused with cocoa.

name: San Mig Apple
description: A crisp bucket of apple-infused beers, ready for autumnal refreshment.  Bucket of 5 San Mig Apple cans (5% ABV); lager with apple flavor, sweet and fruity.

name: San Mig Light
description: A pale bucket of light beers, perfect for watching the sun go down together.  Bucket of 5 San Mig Light bottles (3–4% ABV); light lager, low calories, mild taste.

name: San Mig Pilsen
description: A bucket of bright pilsners, capturing the sharp character of the classic brew.  Bucket of 5 San Mig Pale Pilsen bottles (5% ABV); well-hopped lager, balanced maltiness.

name: San Mig Super Dry
description: A frosty bucket of extra-dry lagers, crisp and clean as mountain air.  Bucket of 5 San Mig Super Dry bottles (5% ABV); ultra-light lager, very dry finish.

name: San Mig Premium All-malt
description: A bucket of all-malt brews, rich and smooth for sharing.  Bucket of 5 San Mig Premium All-Malt bottles (5% ABV); fuller malt flavor in each lager.

name: Smirnoff Mule

name: Special Kinilaw 300g
description: A refreshing ceviche, tangy with tropical zest – seafood cured in vinegar and citrus in a fiery embrace.  300g of Filipino kinilaw: raw fish marinated in vinegar or calamansi juice with ginger, chili, onion, and salt; served cold and spicy.

name: Lumpia Bombs (chicken Spam & Cheese)
description: Golden-fried pockets hiding a molten mix of tender chicken, savory Spam, and melting cheese.  Fried spring rolls filled with shredded chicken, Spam slices, and cheese; crispy on the outside, gooey inside; served with dipping sauce.

name: Lumpia Tacos
description: A playful fusion, where crisp lumpia wrappers cradle seasoned fillings like a fiesta taco.  Lumpia wrappers fried to a crunchy taco shell, filled with spiced pork or beef, lettuce, and salsa; spicy, savory, and handheld.

name: Cheesy Nachos
description: A crunchy mountain of tortilla chips blanketed under melted cheeses and jalapeños, adorned with salsa and sour cream.  Tortilla chips topped with melted cheddar (or mixed cheese), jalapeños, tomatoes, and onions; hearty snack, often served with dips.

name: Seafood Sampler
description: An oceanic bounty on a platter, teeming with shrimp, calamari, and fish, as colorful as a coral reef.  Mixed platter of breaded/fried or grilled seafood (shrimp, squid, fish); served with lemon and dipping sauces; rich in protein.

name: Buttered Chicken
description: Tender morsels bathed in a creamy tomato curry, fragrant with garam masala and a kiss of butter.  Chicken tikka cooked in a spiced tomato-cream sauce (butter chicken style); rich, mildly spiced and served with naan or rice.

name: Four Cheese Pizza
description: A molten tapestry of four cheeses melting into a crispy crust, a symphony of creaminess.  Pizza with mozzarella, cheddar, provolone, and parmesan over tomato sauce on a thin crust; gooey cheese, baked to golden.

name: Veggies & Cheese Pizza
description: A vibrant garden of vegetables crowned with gooey cheese atop a golden crust.  Pizza topped with assorted vegetables (peppers, olives, onions, tomatoes) and mozzarella; flavorful and cheesy.

name: Beef Shawarma Pizza
description: An exotic feast where spiced shawarma beef melds with cheese under a warm crust, East meets West on a plate.  Pizza with marinated beef shawarma, garlic sauce, tomatoes, onions, and mozzarella; savory and aromatic with Middle Eastern spices.

name: Buffalo Chicken Wings
description: Fiery orange wings tossed in spicy buffalo sauce, perfect for heat seekers and sports nights.  Chicken wings deep-fried then coated in tangy-salty buffalo hot sauce; served with cooling ranch or blue cheese dip.

name: Soy Garlic Chicken Wings
description: Golden wings glazed in sticky soy and garlic, a sweet-savory melody with each crispy bite.  Fried chicken wings tossed in a sweet soy-garlic sauce; sticky and flavorful, garnished with sesame and spring onions.

name: Parmesan Chicken Wings
description: Crunchy wings sprinkled with nutty Parmesan and herbs, delivering an Italian twist to classic wings.  Fried wings tossed with garlic-Parmesan seasoning and parsley; savory and crisp, often served with marinara dip.

name: Salted Egg Chicken Wings
description: Rich and indulgent wings coated in a creamy salted egg yolk sauce, intensely savory and luscious.  Crisp fried wings tossed in a sauce made from salted duck egg yolk, butter, and spices; ultra-rich umami flavor.

name: Cheese Quesadilla
description: Griddled tortilla folded around bubbling cheese, a crispy and gooey treat with a Mexican heart.  Flour tortilla filled with shredded cheese (cheddar/Monterey Jack), folded and toasted; served with salsa or sour cream.

name: Plain Rice (1 Cup)
description: A fluffy bed of steamed rice, pure and comforting – the perfect canvas for your main dish.  One cup of plain white rice (approx. 200g cooked); steamed with no oil or seasoning, neutral and filling.

name: Bacardi Gold 750ml
description: A warm golden rum bursting with tropical spice and caramel warmth, like island sunbeams.  Bacardi Gold rum, 750ml, 40% ABV; aged slightly in oak, giving mild vanilla and caramel flavors with a hint of spice.

name: Bacardi Black 750ml

name: Bacardi 8 Y/o 750ml
description: An elegant aged rum, matured into a tapestry of oak, honey, and tobacco whispers.  Bacardi 8 Años, 750ml, 40% ABV; 8 years barrel-aged, offering a smooth amber spirit with dried fruit, oak, and vanilla notes.

name: Don Papa 700ml
description: A velvety Filipino rum swathed in notes of vanilla and candied pineapple, as sweet as Manila twilight.  Don Papa 7-year aged rum, 700ml, 40% ABV; matured in sherry casks, with rich vanilla, apricot, and spice.

name: Cazadores Reposado 750ml
description: An oak-aged tequila glinting golden, mellowed by a gentle whisper of barrel spice.  Cazadores Reposado (aged 2–11 months), 750ml, 40% ABV; smooth with caramel, vanilla, and cooked agave flavors.

name: Patron Silver 750ml
description: A crisp, clear shot of Mexico’s heartland, its pure agave spirit invigorating and pristine.  Patrón Silver, 750ml, 40% ABV; unaged tequila blanco; fresh peppery agave flavor with citrus notes.

name: Patron Reposado 750ml
description: A warm-hued tequila, marrying agave brightness with the gentle embrace of oak.  Patrón Reposado, 750ml, 40% ABV; aged in oak barrels (~2–11 months); soft vanilla and caramel notes over agave.

name: Patron Añejo 750ml
description: A rich amber treasure, with caramel and spice matured gracefully in casks.  Patrón Añejo, 750ml, 40% ABV; aged 1–3 years; deep notes of chocolate, oak, and dried fruit.

name: Patron El Alto 750ml
description: An ultra-pure expression, distilled from highland agave fields for a crisp, clear finish.  Patrón El Alto, 750ml, 40% ABV; premium tequila blanco from high-altitude agave; very smooth with citrus hints.

name: Jose Cuervo 1l
description: A reliable classic tequila, robust and straightforward, pouring Mexico’s heritage by the liter.  Jose Cuervo Especial, 1L, 35% ABV; gold-colored mixto tequila (blend of agave and neutral spirits); mildly sweet with cooked agave notes.

name: Jose Cuervo 700ml
description: The same enduring spirit as its liter kin, a golden nectar echoing centuries of tradition.  Jose Cuervo Especial, 750ml, 35% ABV; popular mixto tequila; smooth with light oak and honey.

name: Olmeca 1l
description: A solid tequila bottled in larger measure, offering youthful agave vibrancy.  Olmeca Tequila (Plata), 1L, 38% ABV; double-distilled from blue agave; crisp, peppery notes.

name: Olmeca 700ml
description: A spirited representation of Jalisco’s heartland, full of agave zest and warmth.  Olmeca Altos Plata, 750ml, 40% ABV; hand-harvested agave; smooth with citrus and fresh agave.

name: 1800 Tequila Blanco 750ml
description: A bright crystalline tequila, clear as silver, singing of pure agave.  1800 Blanco, 750ml, 40% ABV; unaged tequila; crisp, peppery with grassy sweetness.

name: 1800 Tequila Añejo 750ml
description: A velvety tequila dipped in golden age, rich as a caramel sunset.  1800 Añejo, 750ml, 40% ABV; aged in American and French oak; notes of toasted oak, caramel, and slight spice.

name: Don Julio Blanco 750ml
description: A legendary spirit of agave brightness, revered like the first kiss of Jalisco agave.  Don Julio Blanco, 750ml, 40% ABV; premium tequila blanco; smooth with crisp citrus and sweet agave finish.

name: Don Julio 1942 Tequila
description: An exquisite black-label tequila, smooth as velvet, with notes of caramel and fig reminiscent of a fine cognac.  Don Julio 1942, 700ml, 40% ABV; añejo tequila aged ~2.5 years; luxurious sipping tequila with vanilla and toasted oak.

name: Clase Azul Mexico 750ml
description: A masterpiece in porcelain, this tequila offers a lush bouquet of tropical fruit and spice.  Clase Azul Plata, 750ml, 40% ABV; premium tequila; exceptionally smooth, with sweet agave and citrus flavors.

name: Absolut Blue 700ml
description: A crystal-clear Swedish vodka, pure and smooth like Arctic ice.  Absolut Vodka (blue), 700ml, 40% ABV; distilled from winter wheat, no added sugar; neutral and clean taste.

name: Absolut Lime 700ml
description: A lively green-toned vodka kissed with citrus zest, offering a bright lime tang in every sip.  Absolut Lime, 700ml, 40% ABV; infused with real lime and lemon oils; sweet and tart.

name: Absolut Wild Berri 700ml
description: A berry-bright vodka bursting with raspberry and blueberry aromas in every sip.  Absolut Wild Berri, 700ml, 40% ABV; infused with natural raspberry, blackberry and blueberry flavors; sweet and fruity.

name: Absolut Citron 700ml
description: A radiant vodka, infused with sun-kissed lemons and grapefruit for a tangy embrace.  Absolut Citron, 700ml, 40% ABV; real lemon and grapefruit peels; crisp citrus flavor, sweetened.

name: Absolut Blue 1l
description: The same pristinely pure spirit as its 700ml counterpart, now ample for long nights.  Absolut Vodka, 1L, 40% ABV; classic, clean vodka for cocktails or sipping.

name: Absolut Citron 1l
description: A liter of zesty sunshine, packed with the tangy spirit of citrus.  Absolut Citron, 1L, 40% ABV; flavored with lemon/grapefruit; bright and fresh.

name: Absolut Wild Berri 1l
description: A full-size berry-blasted vodka for long celebrations, fruity and vivid.  Absolut Wild Berri, 1L, 40% ABV; natural berry flavors; sweet-tart.

name: Sky Vodka 700ml
description: A smooth and refined vodka that flows as softly as a clear morning sky.  Skyy Vodka, 700ml, 40% ABV; triple-distilled, quadruple-filtered; exceptionally clean and smooth.

name: Grey Goose Original 700ml
description: A French luxury vodka, elegant as champagne, distilled from soft winter wheat.  Grey Goose, 700ml, 40% ABV; single-estate wheat, filtered through limestone; crisp and smooth with subtle almond.

name: Belvedere
description: A Polish vodka of regal heritage, velvety smooth and rich, like silk on the palate.  Belvedere Vodka, 750ml, 40% ABV; made from Dankowskie rye, quadruple distilled; soft vanilla and creamy finish.

name: Belvedere Vodka 10
description: An ultra-pure expression, distilled 10 times for unmatched clarity and gentleness.  Belvedere Vodka 10, 750ml, 40% ABV; 10 times distilled from rye; exceptionally smooth and soft.

name: Ciroc 750ml
description: A glamorous French vodka, made from grapes with a whisper of citrus freshness.  Cîroc Vodka, 750ml, 40% ABV; distilled from French Ugni Blanc grapes; smooth, light, with a hint of fruit.

name: Ciroc 1.75l
description: A large bottle of the same suave vodka, ready to fuel grand celebrations.  Cîroc Vodka, 1.75L, 40% ABV; grape vodka, crisp and smooth.

name: Bombay Sapphire 750ml
description: A royal blue gin that carries a bouquet of botanicals, as crisp as an English garden morning.  Bombay Sapphire, 750ml, 40% ABV; London Dry Gin infused with 10 botanicals (juniper, citrus, almond); light and floral.

name: Malfy (pink Grapefruit) 700ml

name: Tanqueray Dry Gin 750ml
description: A revered London classic, intensely juniper-forward with a timelessly crisp backbone.  Tanqueray London Dry, 750ml, 47.3% ABV; juniper, coriander, angelica; strong, sharp, and botanical.

name: Tanqueray Malacca 1l
description: An exquisite gin liqueur, tropical hints swirling in a rich amber elixir.  Tanqueray Malacca (liqueur), 1L, 39.6% ABV; infused with exotic spices, citrus peel and Madagascar nutmeg; sweet and aromatic.

name: Tanqueray Flor De Sevilla 1l
description: A zesty Spanish-inspired gin, its bright orange blossom aroma transporting you to Seville’s orchards.  Tanqueray Sevilla, 1L, 41.3% ABV; London Dry Gin with Seville orange essence; sweet citrus-forward.

name: Tanqueray No. Ten 700ml
description: An ultra-premium gin, distilled with whole citrus fruits for extra clean, citrusy elegance.  Tanqueray No. Ten, 700ml, 47.3% ABV; small-batch Gin with fresh oranges, grapefruit, chamomile; exceptionally smooth.

name: The Botanist 700ml
description: A herbal treasure trove, capturing Islay’s wild botanicals in a crystal-clear spirit.  The Botanist Islay Gin, 700ml, 46% ABV; 31 foraged botanicals including heather and mint; complex and floral.

name: Beefeater Dry Gin 700ml
description: A classic red-bottle gin, hearty and bold with a quintessential London dry style.  Beefeater London Dry, 700ml, 40% ABV; rich juniper, coriander, citrus peel; robust and traditional.

name: Antidote Citron De Corse 700ml
description: A Mediterranean sun-kissed gin, bright with Corsican lemons and herbal warmth.  Antidote Liqueur de Corse (citron), 700ml, 40% ABV; gin infused with Corsican lemon peel, lavender, rosemary; aromatic citrus finish.

name: Antidote Orange De Corse 700ml
description: A tangy burst from Corsican oranges blending with smooth gin for a sweet, spirited dance.  Antidote Liqueur de Corse (orange), 700ml, 40% ABV; gin infused with blood orange and herbs; sweet and fragrant.

name: Antidote Style Mediterranean 700ml
description: An aromatic escape of Mediterranean herbs, each sip like a scented breeze from Provence.  Antidote Liqueur de Corse (Mediterranean), 700ml, 40% ABV; gin with rosemary, thyme, citrus; savory herbal gin.

name: Antidote Botanicals & Spices 700ml
description: A complex potion of exotic botanicals and spices, bold like an alchemist’s craft.  Antidote Liqueur (Spice), 700ml, 40% ABV; gin with coriander, nutmeg, clove; rich and warm spice profile.

name: Martini Asti Spumante 750ml
description: A frothy Italian sparkler, effervescent and sweet as a celebration in every bubble.  Martini Asti Spumante, 750ml, 7.5% ABV; sweet sparkling Moscato d'Asti wine from Piedmont; notes of pear, peach and honey.

name: Martini Prosecco 750ml
description: A lively Prosecco with crisp apple and citrus twinkles, like spring blossoms in your glass.  Martini Prosecco, 750ml, ~11% ABV; dry Italian sparkling wine (Prosecco DOC); bright with green apple and floral hints.
